Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent some time working[n]with the student council.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The hours flew by as I[n]worked hard on my tasks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Thanks for all your hard work today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh, can I borrow you for a moment, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'd like to hear your opinion on something. It's nothing serious, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Some students think the school uniform should be abolished, and they're gathering supporters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Uniforms serve a purpose. It's a basic lesson that teaches you to play by the rules.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}These students that complain about uniforms think that they can be functional members of society? Laughable![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}They think freedom is a life without rules. It's ridiculous, plain and simple.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Without rules, the whole system will collapse. They're mistaking selfishness for freedom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Sorry, overreacted a bit there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I hate people with no common sense. I have very little desire to talk to them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}And don't take that the wrong way. I just want you to understand where I'm coming from.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think Odagiri's starting to trust me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming better friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused label.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Why don't you head on home? I'll lock up here when I'm finished.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I left the student council room[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
